name: code1
synccode: <div>cdir=`pwd`</div><div>pfr $1.drawio drawio.ohm drawio.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - styleexpander.ohm styleexpander.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - attributeelider.ohm attributeelider.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - emitFactbase.ohm emitFactbase.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | sort&nbsp;<span>&gt; /dev/fd/4</span></div>

name: code2
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">result=`read &lt;/dev/fd/3`</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo $result</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo end 1&gt;&amp;2</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"># no output</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><br></p>
